mapper.select: SELECT id, name, code, module, description, created_at FROM permissions ORDER BY module, id
SELECT id, name, code, module, description, created_at FROM permissions WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, code, module, description, created_at FROM permissions WHERE module = #{module} ORDER BY id
SELECT DISTINCT p.code FROM permissions p INNER JOIN role_permissions rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN admins a ON a.role_id = rp.role_id WHERE a.id = #{adminId}
SELECT code FROM permissions ORDER BY id
SELECT permission_id FROM role_permissions WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
